scripts.build: cp -r public/* dist/ && npx esbuild src/background/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --format=esm --target=chrome120 && npx esbuild src/content/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife --target=chrome120 && npx esbuild src/injected/network-hook.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/injected.js --format=iife --target=chrome120
